title: WAL archive failures (recent)
description: Failed archive attempts in the last 15 minutes (the increase of cnpg_pg_stat_archiver_failed_count, not its raw total). This is what tells you archiving is failing RIGHT NOW. The raw total only ever grows — it counts every failure since the last stats reset, including harmless ones at startup — so a big total by itself does NOT mean there's a problem. Green/0 = fine; any red bars = active failures, so check the archive lag and the object store.
